title: Phantom Blood
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/x9BQJco.png) ![Header](https://i.imgur.com/yp7t1xZ.png) Addon for Haema
Vampire stuff: - Vampire Clothing with unique effects - Stone mask - Alternate way to become vampire - Coffin to sleep away the day JoJo Stands: - The World - Timestop ability - Star Platinum - Timestop ability - Killer Queen - Remote tag detonator
